\tzpentry{ID3813}{Stellarflow Cymatic Action Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3813 introduces Stellarflow Cymatic Action Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$StellarFlow[t] := WeierstrassFunction[\text{CelestialCoordinates} /. \{\alpha \to 2\pi BesselJ[0, \omega_{cymatic} t], \delta \to ArcSin[Sin[\omega_{precession} t]], r \to R_{sphere} (1 + \epsilon Sin[n \omega_{rotation} t])\}]$
\]
